area.name: Area
area.description: Hits all models within blast radius, not just target

ammo_choice.name: Ammo Choice
ammo_choice.description: Before firing, choose between HE (Area, Damage 1) or AP (Piercing, Damage x3)

burn.name: Burn
burn.description: Target continues to take damage in subsequent rounds until extinguished

clumsy.name: Clumsy
clumsy.description: Cannot be used in the same activation as another weapon

crewed.name: Crewed
crewed.description: Requires a weapon team or vehicle mount to operate. Cannot fire if moved

critical.name: Critical
critical.description: Natural 6 to hit causes an automatic wound regardless of Toughness

elegant.name: Elegant
elegant.description: User strikes first in close assault regardless of who charged

focused.name: Focused
focused.description: All shots must target the same model

fog.name: Fog
fog.description: Creates a fog cloud that blocks line of sight

gas.name: Gas
gas.description: Ignores cover. Models with Enviro-suits are immune

heavy.name: Heavy
heavy.description: Cannot fire after moving unless unit has Relentless

indirect.name: Indirect
indirect.description: Can fire at targets without line of sight. Requires communications test

knock_back.name: Knock Back
knock_back.description: Hit target is pushed 1" directly away from the firer

launcher.name: Launcher
launcher.description: Fires grenades. Uses grenade profile for damage/traits. Range from launcher stat

limited_supply.name: Limited Supply
limited_supply.description: Can only be used once per battle

melee.name: Melee
melee.description: Close combat weapon. Can only be used in close assault

minimum_range.name: Minimum Range
minimum_range.description: Cannot fire at targets closer than the specified range

overheat.name: Overheat
overheat.description: If any natural 1s rolled to hit, weapon overheats and cannot fire next activation

piercing.name: Piercing
piercing.description: Target's Saving Throw is worsened by 1 (e.g., 5+ becomes 6+)

pistol.name: Pistol
pistol.description: Can be fired in close assault. Does not prevent charging

shock.name: Shock
shock.description: Hit models gain a Suppression marker even if no damage caused

shrapnel.name: Shrapnel
shrapnel.description: After resolving hits, each missed shot that rolled 4+ causes a Suppression marker

snap_shot.name: Snap Shot
snap_shot.description: Can fire after moving with no penalty

sniping.name: Sniping
sniping.description: Can target specific models in a squad (normally random)

stream.name: Stream
stream.description: Hits all models in a straight line from firer. No roll to hit needed

stun.name: Stun
stun.description: Hit model cannot take actions next activation (only remove stun)

team.name: Team
team.description: Requires 2+ models to operate at full effectiveness. 1 model fires at -1 to hit
